phaseB.method: generalized eigenproblem H v=lam M v (M=h^3 I, lam_phys=lam_euclid/h^3); fixed-asymptotic perturbations; QR-orthonormal analytic-symmetry deflation; matrix-free FD-HVP; multi-start LOBPCG-lite tight eigensolve; battery = eps-scan/overlap/Q_H-effect/direct-energy.

mode_following_256_relaxation.tool: topology-safe production arrested-Newton, fixed boundary, Q-guard, mode-following, rescale-off
mode_following_256_relaxation.finding_gradnorm_not_a_floor: gradnorm 0.12 -> 0.085 (topology-preserving, |Q|=0.9918 held) -- ~0.12 was NOT an irreducible floor. Beyond 0.085 the unconstrained flow DRIFTS toward unwinding (global downhill is vacuum), so a true critical point (gradnorm->0) is NOT reachable at 256^3.

localized_negative_persists.reading: the localized negative mode is ROBUST across gradnorm 0.085-0.13 and 3 seeds -- it does NOT lift with relaxation. The earlier +69 at gradnorm 0.086 was an UNCONVERGED 16-iter probe (RETRACTED); the stable-lean it suggested is withdrawn.

why_still_unresolved_not_fail: field is NOT a true critical point (gradnorm 0.085, cannot go lower without unwinding at 256^3)
contradicts the KNOWN stability of the Q_H=1 Faddeev-Skyrme hopfion (literature) -> most likely a 256^3 grid-scale/discretization artifact
phaseB.verdict: UNRESOLVED (with genuine concern). A robust localized negative Hessian direction persists to the deepest achievable 256^3 relaxation (gradnorm 0.085), not lifting -- so it is NOT a simple non-criticality artifact of an under-relaxed field. But the field is not a true critical point and the mode contradicts the known FS-hopfion stability, so it is most likely a 256^3 discretization artifact. NOT PASS, NOT FAIL_H3_INSTABILITY.
phaseB.decisive_next_test: 384^3 (or higher-order/spectral): re-solve the hopfion at finer resolution and recompute the Hessian at a properly-relaxed field -- if the localized negative VANISHES it was a 256^3 grid artifact (hopfion stable, matches prior); if it PERSISTS converged at a true critical point that is a real FAIL. Charles-sequenced: escalate to 384^3 now that the 256^3 mode-following test is done.
phaseB.gate: UNRESOLVED -- 256^3 mode-following test COMPLETE (negative persists); 384^3 is the decisive escalation.
